_note: Golden MCP tool calls evaluated against knowledge-graph.json (the local cache seed). Tombstoned entities (note-old) are excluded from active results. The exact JSON envelope should match the reference clients; what is checked here is the essential content — which entity ids come back. Each tool returns a JSON text payload (success: the tool result; failure: {error}).

cases.note: name/content match; ordering by score is fine
a relationship path exists lamp->living ...(door)... kitchen->oven; exact intermediate set may vary, but it must connect the endpoints
tombstoned entity: treated as gone (returns deleted/absent, not an active note)
